summary: Made one surgical exit-seam adjustment. The opening already used a distinct cold-room systems entry point from the adjacent chapter material, so it was left intact. The closing was revised to avoid repeating chapter 2's withheld-report handoff too closely and now lands on Yusuf's private custody of the copied anomaly record.
edits: Moved the blank incident-form closure earlier in the final movement so the chapter does not end on another withheld-report beat.
Recast the last line to end on the archived anomaly data in Yusuf's drawer, reinforcing the carry-forward hook into his private archive.
